name: UBA : Populate Multiple VPN Accounts Logged In from Single IP
notes: Maps multiple VPN users that are coming from the same IP address and then raises the risk score. When the rule detects VPN users coming from the same IP address, the IP address is added to the "UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Logged In from Single IP” reference set.
bb_references: BB:UBA : VPN Login Successful match at least 2 times with the same Source IP and different Username in 1 hour(s)
conditions_text: when any of Source IP are contained in any of UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Logged In From Single IP - IP
when BB:UBA : VPN Login Successful match at least 2 times with the same Source IP and different Username in 1 hour(s)
thresholds: when BB:UBA : VPN Login Successful match at least 2 times with the same Source IP and different Username in 1 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Populate Multiple VPN Accounts Logged In from Single IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when any of Source IP are contained in any of UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Logged In From Single IP - IP
AND when BB:UBA : VPN Login Successful match at least 2 times with the same Source IP and different Username in 1 hour(s)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Populate Multiple VPN Accounts Logged In from Single IP
Add the "sourceIP" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Logged In from Single IP"
